languages.text: "В вере люди находят поддержку в самые темные часы. Он праведен не потому, что читал проповеди, а из-за того, ради кого он это делал".
"In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."
languages.original_text: "В вере люди находят поддержку в самые темные часы. Он праведен не потому, что читал проповеди, а из-за того, ради кого он это делал".

traits.locale_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."
"In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."
"In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

languages.text: 「最も暗い時、人々は信仰に力を得る。彼は説いたことではなく、誰のために説いたかによって正義である」
languages.original_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

traits.locale_text: 「最も暗い時、人々は信仰に力を得る。彼は説いたことではなく、誰のために説いたかによって正義である。」

languages.text: “在最黑暗的时刻，唯有信仰能赐予凡人力量。他之所以正义，不在于他布道的内容，而在于他为谁布道。”
languages.original_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

traits.locale_text: “在最黑暗的时刻，唯有信仰能赐予凡人力量。他之所以正义，不在于他布道的内容，而在于他为谁布道。”

languages.text: «En los momentos más oscuros, la gente encuentra fuerzas en la fe. No es virtuoso por el contenido de sus sermones, sino por el motivo por el que los recitaba».
languages.original_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

traits.locale_text: «En los momentos más oscuros, la gente encuentra fuerzas en la fe. No es virtuoso por el contenido de sus sermones, sino por el motivo por el que los recitaba».

languages.text: "In ihrer dunkelsten Stunde finden die Menschen Stärke im Glauben. Nicht was er gepredigt hat, macht ihn rechtschaffen, sondern für wen er es tat."
languages.original_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

traits.locale_text: "In ihrer dunkelsten Stunde finden die Menschen Stärke im Glauben. Nicht was er gepredigt hat, macht ihn rechtschaffen, sondern für wen er es tat."

languages.text: « Dans les heures les plus sombres, la foi est source de force. Ce n'est pas la nature de ses prédications qui le rend vertueux, mais ceux à qui il les a prodiguées. »
languages.original_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

traits.locale_text: « Dans les heures les plus sombres, la foi est source de force. Ce n'est pas la nature de ses prédications qui le rend vertueux, mais ceux à qui il les a prodiguées. »

languages.text: "İnsanlar, en karanlık saatlerinde gücü inançta bulurlar. Vaazında ne söylediği değil, kimin için söylediği onu doğru yapıyor."
languages.original_text: "In their darkest hour, the people find strength in faith. He is righteous not because of what he preached, but because of whom he did it for."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlar, en karanlık saatlerinde gücü inançta bulurlar. Vaazında ne söylediği değil, kimin için söylediği onu doğru yapıyor."
